english_script: Hi guys, it's Ivy. Day 7 of my daily English practice. I keep talking to improve my oral English. Today I watched a YouTube short. It was about how to stay focused while studying. The video shared some simple tips. First, put your phone away. It is a big distraction. Second, set a timer for 25 minutes. Work hard during that time. Then take a short break. This is called the Pomodoro method. Third, write down your goals. Know what you want to finish. This helps you stay on track. Fourth, find a quiet place. Noise can make it hard to focus. The speaker said small changes can help a lot. I learned that breaking tasks into small parts works well. It makes big work feel easier. From this I learned that being focused is a skill. We can practice it every day. Thank you for listening, see you tomorrow.
chinese_translation: 大家好，我是Ivy。我日常英语练习的第七天。我坚持说话来提高我的英语口语。今天我看了一个YouTube短视频。它讲的是如何在学习时保持专注。这个视频分享了一些简单的技巧。第一，把手机拿开。它是一个很大的干扰。第二，设定一个25分钟的计时器。在那段时间里努力学习。然后休息一小会儿。这叫做番茄工作法。第三，写下你的目标。知道你要完成什么。这能帮助你保持正轨。第四，找一个安静的地方。噪音会让你很难集中注意力。演讲者说小的改变可以有很大帮助。我学到了把任务分成小块很有效。它让大的工作感觉更容易。从中学到专注是一种技能。我们可以每天练习它。谢谢聆听，明天见。
